channel.title: INfood
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from INfood, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Baked Sweet Hawaiian Chicken
item.description: I’m updating my “Tuesday night dinner that feels like we’re in Hawaii” with double the sauce! You guys asked, so…

item.title: No-Bake Strawberry Cream Pie
item.description: When it’s too hot to even think about turning on the oven, this no bake strawberry cream pie is exactly…

item.title: Mexican Macaroni Salad
item.description: This Mexican macaroni salad is a fun twist on a classic! It’s creamy, tangy, and full of flavor with crisp…

item.title: Skirt Steak Marinade
item.description: This Skirt Steak Marinade is the kind of marinade that makes you feel like you know what you’re doing with…

item.title: Weekly Meal Plan #85
item.description: You know that moment when 5 pm hits and everyone’s suddenly starving, and you have no plan? Yeah… not this…

item.title: Strawberries & Cream Chia Pudding
item.description: Friends, welcome to a land where you can float on strawberry dream clouds all day long. This chia pudding is next-level but still ultra simple ( 5 ing...

item.title: Vegan Sweet Potato Chickpea Taco Salad
item.description: If you love our Sweet Potato Chickpea Tacos, get ready for another FAVE! Meet: the Vegan Sweet Potato Chickpea TACO SALAD! It’s got fresh kale + romai...

item.title: Cheesy Jalapeño Cashew Dressing
item.description: Move over, Ranch, there’s a new creamy dressing in town that’s stealing our hearts! This cheesy jalapeño cashew dressing is our new go-to for salads, ...

item.title: Fudgy Chocolate Tahini Cookies (1 Bowl!)
item.description: While recently making our tahini cookies for what felt like the millionth time, we thought, Why not add chocolate to this party? The result was even b...
